title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, February 08 2022
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 09/02/2022
Image reference: 2022-02-09_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-february-08-2022_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have remained stable. VLCC Athenian Success (317,400 DWT, Jan 2010, Hyundai Heavy Ind) sold to Sinokor for USD 42.50 mil, VV value USD 38.91 mil - Prompt Delivery. Aframax Gundala (107,000 DWT, Jan 2003, Imabari) sold for USD 11.70 mil, VV value USD 11.36 mil - DD Passed.
